center.name: 欽奇佩河
center.summary: 欽奇佩河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Collared antshrike、北方藍灰蟻鵙，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: shumbae is found in north-central Peru in the watersheds of the Marañón River and its tributary the Chinchipe River

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: leucogaster is found in the watersheds of the Marañón River and its tributary Chinchipe River in far southern Ecuador's Zamora-Chinchipe Province and northern Peru's departments of Cajamarca and Amazonas

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: shumbae is found in north-central Peru in the watersheds of the Marañón River and its tributary the Chinchipe River

links.label: 分布于
